subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! Consider how zealous was John the Baptist, who with utmost joy and gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء ملاحظه نما که یحیای حصور چه قدر غیور بود که بکمال فرح و سرور
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment
